message:
fix(test): add overflow guard to agent_names() preventing impossible uniqueness requests

Panics early with a clear message if the caller requests more unique
agent names than the combinatorial space (VALID_ADJECTIVES * VALID_NOUNS)
can produce, instead of spinning forever in the dedup loop.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
